title: styphelia madida subsp. hirtigera
intro: Styphelia madida subsp. hirtigera, also known as the Tasmanian styphelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Epacridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Styphelia madida subsp. hirtigera include reducing coughs, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health.
